btc_20pct_drop_probability.description: Based on the agents' discussions, posts, sentiment, concrete price predictions, on-chain reports, and any whale moves discussed in this branch, estimate the probability that BTC drops 20%+ from its current price ($20,500) within the next 24 hours of simulated time. Calibrate based on: consensus among agents (what fraction expect a drop vs hold); intensity of panic vs calm rhetoric; concrete BTC price targets mentioned ("BTC to $14k", "BTC sub-$17k by morning"); reports of institutional/whale selling; correlation arguments (e.g. "if SOL goes, BTC goes"). 0.0 = the branch consensus is that BTC holds; 1.0 = the branch consensus is that BTC will definitely break $16,400.

contagion_breadth_score.description: How wide is the contagion narrative? 0 = isolated to FTX/FTT/SOL only; 5 = mid-cap exchanges and lenders also dragged in; 10 = systemic crypto crisis discussion (BTC/ETH lows, stablecoin contagion, regulatory intervention talk). Score this branch's typical post.

ftx_withdrawal_halt_probability.description: Probability that FTX halts withdrawals within the next 24 simulated hours, inferred from agent discussions of withdrawal queue length, SBF statements, on-chain outflow signals, and prior-collapse comparisons.

panic_score.description: Average sentiment of branch posts about the cascade. 0 = total panic / "get out now" rhetoric; 5 = mixed / debated; 10 = calm / dismissive of contagion risk.

outcome_schema.description: Based on the agents' discussions, posts, sentiment, concrete price predictions, on-chain reports, and any whale moves discussed in this branch, estimate the probability that BTC drops 20%+ from its current price ($20,500) within the next 24 hours of simulated time. Calibrate based on: consensus among agents (what fraction expect a drop vs hold); intensity of panic vs calm rhetoric; concrete BTC price targets mentioned ("BTC to $14k", "BTC sub-$17k by morning"); reports of institutional/whale selling; correlation arguments (e.g. "if SOL goes, BTC goes"). 0.0 = the branch consensus is that BTC holds; 1.0 = the branch consensus is that BTC will definitely break $16,400.
outcome_schema.name: btc_20pct_drop_probability

outcome_schema.description: Probability that FTX halts withdrawals within the next 24 simulated hours, inferred from agent discussions of withdrawal queue length, SBF statements, on-chain outflow signals, and prior-collapse comparisons.
outcome_schema.name: ftx_withdrawal_halt_probability

outcome_schema.description: How wide is the contagion narrative? 0 = isolated to FTX/FTT/SOL only; 5 = mid-cap exchanges and lenders also dragged in; 10 = systemic crypto crisis discussion (BTC/ETH lows, stablecoin contagion, regulatory intervention talk). Score this branch's typical post.
outcome_schema.name: contagion_breadth_score

outcome_schema.description: Average sentiment of branch posts about the cascade. 0 = total panic / "get out now" rhetoric; 5 = mixed / debated; 10 = calm / dismissive of contagion risk.
outcome_schema.name: panic_score

outcome_schema.description: Did 3+ posts discuss the possibility of Binance acquiring FTX?
outcome_schema.name: cz_acquisition_mentioned

outcome_schema.description: Did agents report SOL dropping 30%+ from its $32 starting price?
outcome_schema.name: sol_dump_observed

outcome_schema.description: Did agents express concern about USDT/USDC contagion from the FTX collapse (e.g. "Tether next?")?
outcome_schema.name: stablecoin_contagion_concern

outcome_schema.description: Did 2+ agents mention SEC/CFTC/DOJ likely involvement or specific regulator names as imminently relevant?
outcome_schema.name: regulator_action_anticipated

children.label: nested_stabilizing_bailout_syndicate
children.perturbation_text: A consortium of top-tier venture capital firms, including Sequoia Capital and Paradigm, has officially announced a $3 billion capital infusion to backstop FTX's reserves. The joint statement confirms that a new oversight board has been appointed to audit Alameda Research's balance sheet, with immediate effect. BTC has rebounded to $21,800 as market participants interpret the move as a definitive end to the liquidity crunch.

children.label: nested_escalating_regulatory_freeze
children.perturbation_text: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has filed an emergency injunction to freeze the assets of both FTX and Alameda Research, citing concerns over the commingling of customer funds. Concurrently, the platform has officially halted all withdrawals, citing 'unforeseen technical maintenance' on the main gateway. BTC has plummeted to $17,500 as institutional desks move to liquidate all remaining crypto-exposure immediately.

children.label: nested_ambiguous_solana_fork
children.perturbation_text: The Solana Foundation has released a statement distancing its network from Alameda Research, announcing that a significant portion of SOL tokens previously held by the firm have been moved to an independent, time-locked escrow wallet. Meanwhile, FTX has resumed limited withdrawals, but only for specific non-FTT pairs, leading to massive price discrepancies across different exchanges. On-chain analysts are divided on whether this is a strategic decoupling or a desperate attempt to obscure the depletion of reserves.

children.label: sbf_liquidity_injection
children.perturbation_text: FTX CEO Sam Bankman-Fried has announced a $2 billion emergency liquidity injection into the exchange, sourced from personal holdings and private equity partners. In a statement, he confirmed that all withdrawal requests are being processed in real-time and accused market participants of spreading malicious misinformation. FTT has rebounded 15% on the news.

children.label: binance_full_acquisition
children.perturbation_text: Binance and FTX have issued a joint press release stating that Binance has signed a non-binding letter of intent to acquire FTX.com to address the liquidity crunch. Changpeng Zhao stated that this move is intended to protect users and ensure market stability during this turbulent period. BTC has stabilized at $20,400 as the market digests the potential for a centralized rescue.

children.label: alameda_insolvency_leak
children.perturbation_text: New on-chain analysis from Nansen reveals that Alameda Research has begun aggressively selling SOL and SRM to cover margin calls on Aave. Simultaneously, two major DeFi protocols have voted to pause all FTT-collateralized lending markets effective immediately. BTC has dropped to $18,200 as market participants brace for further liquidations.

children.label: regulator_subpoena_storm
children.perturbation_text: The SEC and CFTC have simultaneously issued subpoenas to FTX and Alameda Research regarding the handling of customer funds and potential securities violations. Regulators have requested a full audit of all corporate entities associated with the SBF empire. The news has sent shockwaves through the market, with ETH dropping 12% in under an hour.

children.label: stablecoin_depeg_rumors
children.perturbation_text: Rumors are circulating that Tether's treasury holds significant unsecured debt from Alameda Research, leading to a slight widening of the USDT/USD spread on secondary markets. While Tether has denied any exposure, the market is reacting with heightened sensitivity to any deviation from the dollar peg. BTC volatility has spiked as traders rotate into USDC and fiat.

children.label: solana_ecosystem_collapse
children.perturbation_text: As Alameda Research continues to dump SOL to meet withdrawal demands, the Solana network has experienced a series of validator outages due to extreme transaction volume. Several key DeFi protocols on Solana have reported a total loss of TVL as collateral values plummeted past liquidation thresholds. SOL is down 45% in the last six hours.

children.label: market_wide_sideways_uncertainty
children.perturbation_text: FTX has issued a statement claiming that all withdrawal delays are due to a technical glitch in their banking API, which is now being resolved. Market sentiment remains paralyzed, with BTC oscillating between $20,000 and $20,800 as traders wait for definitive on-chain proof of solvency. No clear trend has emerged as both bulls and bears claim the data supports their position.

children.label: institutional_bank_run_cascade
children.perturbation_text: Several major institutional hedge funds have publicly announced they are halting all activity on FTX and withdrawing their capital due to 'counterparty risk concerns.' The withdrawal queue has now reached a 12-hour wait time, providing concrete evidence of a classic bank run. BTC has plummeted to $16,900 as the market prices in a full-scale systemic failure.
